requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Telecommunications, EMC, and Weak-Grid Power Quality
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、电信、EMC及薄弱电网电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、電信、EMC及薄弱電網電能品質

summary.en: Liberia does not have a confirmed national public EV charging back-office platform comparable to mature EV markets. For networked chargers, OCPP interoperability, SIM/router selection, cybersecurity settings, remote fault reporting, metering data, access control, and load management will likely be imposed by the fleet operator, donor, EPC, charge-point operator, site owner, LERC/LEC process, or telecom permit conditions. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under the IEC 61000 series because Liberia's constrained grid, long feeders, generator-backed sites, and tropical storm environment make harmonics, flicker, conducted and radiated emissions, surge immunity, and voltage dips material project risks.
summary.zh: 未确认利比里亚拥有类似成熟EV市场的全国公共充电后台平台。对于联网充电桩，OCPP互操作、SIM/路由器选择、网络安全设置、远程故障报告、计量数据、访问控制和负载管理，很可能由车队运营商、捐助方、EPC、充电点运营商、场地方、LERC/LEC流程或电信许可条件提出。由于利比里亚电网容量受限、馈线较长、场址可能依赖发电机备用且存在热带雷暴环境，应按IEC 61000系列准备EMC和电能质量证据，因为谐波、闪变、传导和辐射发射、浪涌抗扰及电压暂降都是实际项目风险。
summary.zht: 未確認賴比瑞亞擁有類似成熟EV市場的全國公共充電後台平台。對於聯網充電樁，OCPP互操作、SIM/路由器選擇、網絡安全設置、遠程故障報告、計量數據、訪問控制和負載管理，很可能由車隊運營商、捐助方、EPC、充電點運營商、場地方、LERC/LEC流程或電信許可條件提出。由於賴比瑞亞電網容量受限、饋線較長、場址可能依賴發電機備用且存在熱帶雷暴環境，應按IEC 61000系列準備EMC和電能品質證據，因為諧波、閃變、傳導和輻射發射、浪湧抗擾及電壓暫降都是實際項目風險。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, surge immunity, and voltage dips
Project-owner, donor, EPC, CPO, LERC, LEC, or telecom operator communications specifications
Liberia 120/240 V, 60 Hz weak-grid and generator-backed site context

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-BMS communication, a CAN bus protocol that is not a back-office protocol and is not interoperable with CCS1 DC communication. China network operators may use proprietary or OCPP-based back-office systems, but domestic EMC and power-quality tests are normally performed against China 50 Hz operating conditions and China connector assumptions. These reports do not prove 60 Hz Liberia performance, cellular compatibility, or acceptance by a project back office.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为充电机与BMS之间的通信协议，该协议为CAN总线协议，不是后台协议，也不与CCS1直流通信互操作。中国网络运营商可能使用私有或基于OCPP的后台系统，但国内EMC和电能质量测试通常基于中国50 Hz运行条件和中国接口假设。这些报告不能证明60 Hz利比里亚性能、蜂窝网络兼容性或项目后台验收。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為充電機與BMS之間的通訊協議，該協議為CAN總線協議，不是後台協議，也不與CCS1直流通訊互操作。中國網絡運營商可能使用私有或基於OCPP的後台系統，但國內EMC和電能品質測試通常基於中國50 Hz運行條件和中國接口假設。這些報告不能證明60 Hz賴比瑞亞性能、蜂窩網絡兼容性或項目後台驗收。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC and power-quality test reports under China domestic 50 Hz operating conditions

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: (1) the OCPP version, security profile, certificate handling, SIM/router bands, and data plan required by the project; (2) whether the charger can operate with intermittent telecom coverage and generator-backed supply; (3) IEC 61000 harmonic, flicker, surge, voltage-dip, conducted-emission, and radiated-emission evidence at 60 Hz; (4) load-management behavior acceptable to LEC or the site microgrid; (5) remote firmware update, access-control, and fault-reporting procedures. GB/T 27930 DC communication does not replace OCPP, and China 50 Hz EMC evidence should be revalidated for Liberia conditions.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认：(1) 项目要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、证书处理、SIM/路由器频段和数据套餐；(2) 充电桩是否能在电信覆盖间歇和发电机备用供电下运行；(3) 60 Hz下IEC 61000谐波、闪变、浪涌、电压暂降、传导发射和辐射发射证据；(4) LEC或场址微电网可接受的负载管理行为；(5) 远程固件更新、访问控制和故障报告流程。GB/T 27930直流通信不能替代OCPP，中国50 Hz EMC证据应针对利比里亚条件重新验证。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認：(1) 項目要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、證書處理、SIM/路由器頻段和數據套餐；(2) 充電樁是否能在電信覆蓋間歇和發電機備用供電下運行；(3) 60 Hz下IEC 61000諧波、閃變、浪湧、電壓暫降、傳導發射和輻射發射證據；(4) LEC或場址微電網可接受的負載管理行為；(5) 遠程韌體更新、訪問控制和故障報告流程。GB/T 27930直流通訊不能替代OCPP，中國50 Hz EMC證據應針對賴比瑞亞條件重新驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — OCPP, telecom, and cybersecurity requirements become mandatory when specified by the owner/operator/donor; EMC and power-quality evidence is a practical gate for LEC, site engineer, or microgrid acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC charger-to-vehicle protocol and is not an OCPP or Liberia back-office substitute; China 50 Hz EMC evidence is not sufficient for 60 Hz Liberia claims

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Liberia networked charger requirements will likely be project-led. Prepare OCPP and telecom evidence separately from GB/T 27930, and revalidate EMC and power quality for 60 Hz, weak-grid, humid tropical conditions before claiming Liberia readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 利比里亚联网充电桩要求很可能由项目主导。应将OCPP和电信证据与GB/T 27930分开准备，并在宣称满足利比里亚要求前，针对60 Hz、薄弱电网和湿热条件重新验证EMC和电能质量。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 賴比瑞亞聯網充電樁要求很可能由項目主導。應將OCPP和電信證據與GB/T 27930分開準備，並在宣稱滿足賴比瑞亞要求前，針對60 Hz、薄弱電網和濕熱條件重新驗證EMC和電能品質。
